contracts.project: City of Lancaster Comprehensive Plan Update
contracts.notes: Professional services agreement for updating the City of Lancaster's Comprehensive Plan, including future land use, transportation, infrastructure, economic development, open space and recreation, community character and design, historic preservation, and public facilities.

contracts.project: Comprehensive Plan Update
contracts.notes: Full update of the City's Comprehensive Plan including community development, future land use mapping, transportation planning, infrastructure review, economic development strategy, open space planning, community character and design guidelines, historic preservation analysis, sustainable practices recommendations, and extensive public involvement coordination.

contracts.project: Smart Technology Air Quality Monitoring System Installation
contracts.limits: 3 locations: 100 Craig Shaw Memorial Parkway, 3132 North Houston School Road, and 1960 West Beltline Road
contracts.notes: Design and installation of smart technology air filtration and air quality monitoring systems with automation controls at three City facilities. Includes Thinklite Flair air quality monitoring system, AirMATION air filtration units, and Desigo CC automation system.

contracts.project: Smart Technology for Air Quality Monitoring
contracts.limits: 100 Craig Shaw Memorial Parkway, 3132 North Houston School Road, and 1960 West Beltline Road
contracts.notes: Design and installation of smart technology to enhance air quality monitoring at three City of Lancaster facilities.

contracts.project: Smart Technology Enhancement for Air Quality Monitoring
contracts.notes: Design and installation of Smart Technology to enhance air quality monitoring technology at three City of Lancaster facilities: 100 Craig Shaw Memorial Parkway, 3132 North Houston School Road, and 1960 West Beltline Road.

contracts.project: Oncor Ten Mile Substation
contracts.notes: Engineering and design services for a new Oncor electric switching station with landscape plan development and site design coordination.

contracts.project: QTS Belt Line Planned Development
contracts.notes: Planning and engineering services for a Planned Development District to support data center and industrial uses on approximately 98.60 acres, including concept plans, development regulations, and site design standards.

contracts.project: Belt Line Road Roadway Improvements
contracts.limits: Bluegrove Road to Main Street, approximately 4900 LF
contracts.notes: Engineering design services for four-lane divided roadway improvements on Belt Line Road, including survey, SUE, 30/60/90/100% design phases, project management, bidding phase services, and construction phase services.

contracts.project: Belt Line Road Roadway Improvements (Bluegrove Road to Main Street)
contracts.limits: Approximately 4,900 LF from Bluegrove Road to Main Street
contracts.notes: Engineering design services for four-lane divided roadway improvements including survey, SUE, 30/60/90/100% design phases, project management, bidding phase services, and construction phase services for Belt Line Road.

contracts.project: Bueller Development Planned Development District
contracts.notes: Planning and engineering services for a 248.86-acre Planned Development with data center uses located south of the intersection of E. Belt Line Road and Ferris Road in Lancaster, Texas.

contracts.project: Water and Wastewater Master Plan Update
contracts.notes: Update to the 2021 Water and Wastewater Master Plan to address projected water demands and wastewater flows resulting from industrial growth in the southeastern portion of the City, including short-term and long-term capital improvement program recommendations through 2045.

contracts.project: Pinto Road 12" Water Main Design Services
contracts.notes: Design services for a 12-inch water main including preliminary design, final design, construction documents, subsurface utility engineering (SUE), field survey, and geotechnical investigations, with record drawing deliverables.

contracts.project: Disaster Debris Monitoring and Consulting Services (Primary)

contracts.project: Master Thoroughfare Plan Amendment - Greene Road Reclassification
contracts.limits: Greene Road from Cornell Road to Sunrise Road
contracts.notes: Engineering and planning services for Master Thoroughfare Plan amendment to reclassify Greene Road from a four-lane Minor Arterial to a three-lane Major Urban Collector in support of anticipated data center development.

contracts.project: Master Thoroughfare Plan Amendment - Alba Road Reclassification
contracts.limits: Alba Road from Greene Road to East Belt Line Road
contracts.notes: Engineering and planning services for Master Thoroughfare Plan amendment to reclassify Alba Road from a 100-foot Major Arterial Type B (four-lane) to a 60-foot Major Urban Collector (Type D1 three-lane) with traffic impact analysis.

contracts.project: Economic Development Strategic Plan Update
contracts.notes: Comprehensive economic development strategic planning for the City of Lancaster, including business climate analysis, peer benchmarking, stakeholder engagement, and development of a strategic framework with implementation strategy to guide economic development priorities and industrial recruitment.

contracts.project: Lancaster Economic Development Strategic Plan
contracts.notes: Comprehensive economic development strategic planning for the City of Lancaster, including peer benchmarking, cluster and sector analysis, stakeholder engagement, and implementation roadmap development.

contracts.project: Lancaster Economic Development Strategy
contracts.notes: Comprehensive economic development strategic planning including contextual analysis, cluster and sector analysis, community engagement, and implementation roadmap for the City of Lancaster to support workforce development and strategic pivot to technology-related businesses and advanced manufacturing.

contracts.project: Third-Party Plan Review and Building Inspection Services
contracts.notes: Professional services agreement for third-party plan review and building inspection services for residential and commercial permit applications. Services include plan reviews, building inspections, and certified building official services compensated at 30% of applicable plan review and inspection fees.

contracts.project: Plastic Road Research and Implementation for Road Reconstruction
contracts.notes: Engineering services for plastic road research and implementation for road reconstruction utilizing innovative plastic-infused materials.

contracts.notes: Site improvement design and engineering services for proposed chain-link fencing, motorized gates, pavement, and landscaping at FedEx distribution facility.

contracts.project: Pinto Road New 12-inch Water Line Installation
contracts.limits: East Pleasant Run Road to Greene Road
contracts.notes: Installation of a new 12-inch water line at Pinto Road, including pipe installation, fittings, fire hydrants, valves, and associated construction work such as trenching, backfill, paving, and stormwater management.

contracts.project: Traffic Signal at Houston School Road and West Wintergreen Road
contracts.limits: Houston School Road and West Wintergreen Road intersection
contracts.notes: Construction and installation of a new traffic signal at the intersection of Houston School Road and West Wintergreen Road.

contracts.project: Pinto Road Construction of New 12" Waterline
contracts.limits: Pinto Road from East Pleasant Run Road to Greene Road; approximately 3,800 linear feet
contracts.notes: Construction and installation of a new 12-inch water main along Pinto Road to connect the loop and supply water for future development in the area.
